description_long: This ornate sconce features a classic chandelier design with a central column and six gracefully curved arms, each supporting a candle-like bulb holder. The structure is highly decorative, with intricate detailing along the arms and central stem, evoking a sense of vintage elegance. The material appears to be glass or crystal, giving the fixture a translucent, shimmering quality that would reflect and refract light beautifully. The bulb holders are shaped to resemble traditional candle flames, enhancing the antique aesthetic. The top of the sconce is adorned with a decorative finial, adding to its luxurious appearance. This fixture is designed to be mounted on a ceiling, making it a striking centerpiece in upscale urban interiors such as lobbies, ballrooms, or historic buildings.
description: A vintage-style chandelier sconce with six curved arms, candle-like bulbs, and ornate glass or crystal detailing, designed for ceiling mounting.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six arms symmetrically radiating from the central column, with clear visibility of the decorative finial and candle-like bulbs.
description_view_1: Side view, nearly identical to the front, with the same symmetrical arrangement of arms and bulbs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, mirroring the front, with the same ornate detailing and arm arrangement visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again nearly identical to the front and side, showing the symmetrical design and decorative elements.
attribute_fixture_design: Vintage and ornate, this fixture features classic chandelier motifs with curved arms, candle-like bulbs, and intricate glass or crystal detailing, evoking a sense of old-world luxury.
